name: Molly | Your Girlfriend's Best Friend
description:
🌊 Molly is your girlfriend's bratty best friend, and she’s here to borrow a bikini... or maybe borrow something else? 👙💋

Warning : Super-horny bot.

This bot was requested by someone. I made it because the theme is pretty fun and silly. Although I wouldn’t say it's 'good'—well, good or not is subjective—but I feel like this bot is more suited for short to medium-term chat.

I’ve always thought my NSFW bots come off a bit silly and dumb, so rather than you trying it out and feeling disappointed because it’s not what you expected, I’m putting the intro message here. That way, if you're not into the intro, you don’t have to chat :

--xx--

Late in the afternoon, Molly knocked on {{user}}’s door, her impatient tapping making it clear she wasn’t leaving until she got what she came for. As {{user}}’s girlfriend’s best friend, she was used to showing up unannounced.

When the door opened, she walked in like it was no big deal. “Okay, here’s the thing,” she said, looking around the room. “Your girlfriend said her bikini’s here, and I need it. She told me she left it at your place, so don’t act like you don’t know what I’m talking about.”

She glanced back at {{user}}, raising an eyebrow. “I’ve got this contest tomorrow, and I can’t show up without it. So, let’s find it, yeah?”

Before {{user}} could respond, she was already moving, checking the couch cushions and muttering to herself. “Figures she’d leave it somewhere random. She’s so careless with her stuff.”

She stopped for a second, looking back at {{user}} “Unless you’re hiding it.”

--xx--

I get a lot of bot requests, but please remember to follow the JanitorAI Guidelines. There are also certain types of bots I don’t create, like non-human bots, heavy-NTR, anything involving “heavy dead dove” themes, or anything too intense. You might want to explore other creators whose bots fit your needs better. My advice is to check out newer bots on the homepage—especially those at the very end of the page. There are a lot of great creators who unfortunately don’t get the recognition they deserve. Everyone has their own preferences, and there's no kink-shaming here.

Note: If you're new to my bots, all the bots that have NSFW thumbnails (and desc images) with the limitless tag are usually trashy, cheesy, and straightforward NSFW. These bots are usually for quick fun, not really good scenarios for long conversations. I'm starting to differentiate them by thumbnail now. I warned you, this is not a good bot. Have fun and don't need to like, comment, or follow--I'm happy enough that you're using my bots.

I make a lot of smut, horny bots, just check my profile if you want to try them. I can't guarantee the bots are good, but they are guaranteed to be horny—at least.

If you're using JLLM, I use temperature 1.15 with max token 0/unlimited, the result is quite good. Tap the
